name: Dual-Projection Sculpture Rig
description: Physically reconstruct a five-object sculpture from simultaneous front and side projection seals, then survive a force-driven settle inspection.
natural_language: Move all five objects from the rotating carousel to the worktable. Make the live solid marks coincide with the target outlines in both FRONT (X/Y) and SIDE (depth/Y) seals, anticipate the visible force drift, then certify the settled sculpture.

metadata.variant_count_kind: object-carousel phases, dual-view sculpture geometry, depth order, and settle-force combinations
metadata.notes: This is a spatial reconstruction task rather than a prose relation quiz: five moving objects must be carried, matched across two orthogonal projections, depth-calibrated, and observed through a deterministic settle phase. The verifier reconstructs every gesture and both final projections.
